data.title: Concentrix Posts Better-Than-Expected Earnings, Joins Soleno Therapeutics, Petco Health and Wellness, MillerKnoll And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Thursday
What's Going On With Tilray Brands Stock Today?
data.description: Tilray Brands shares are slightly higher after a court dismissed a lawsuit. Recently, the company strengthened its partnership with Whole Foods Market by bringing back its energy brand, HiBall Energy, to U.S. retail shelves this spring.

data.title: Microsoft Halts Expansion Plans, Yet Analysts Still Rank It Among Top Investment Picks
data.description: Microsoft has halted data center projects in the US and Europe, potentially due to AI computing overcapacity. Goldman Sachs sees it as a top investment.

data.title: Fashion Retailer H&M Reports Modest Sales Growth In Q1, Faces Margin Pressures
data.description: Hennes & Mauritz saw a 3% rise in Q1 net sales, reaching SEK 55.3 billion ($5.1 billion). However, gross margin declined to 49.1% due to economic pressures and increased markdowns. Operating profit fell to SEK 1.2 billion, impacted by higher costs and logistics challenges.

data.title: GameStop Stock Is Moving Lower Thursday: What's Going On?
data.description: GameStop Corp (NYSE:GME) shares are falling Thursday after the company announced a proposed private offering
